description:
I'm an integration developer testing our payment API and I need help filtering through a log file to find specific error patterns.

I have an API log file located at `/home/user/api_logs/payment_api.log` that contains various log entries from our payment processing system. Each log line follows this format:
`[TIMESTAMP] [LEVEL] [REQUEST_ID] - Message`

For example:
`[2024-01-15 10:23:45] [ERROR] [REQ-A1B2C3] - Connection timeout to payment gateway`

I need you to extract all ERROR level log entries that contain the word "timeout" (case-insensitive) from this log file. 

Please save the filtered results to a new file at `/home/user/api_logs/timeout_errors.txt`. The output file should contain only the matching log lines, one per line, exactly as they appear in the original log file (preserving the original format and case of the lines). The lines in the output file should appear in the same order as they appear in the input file.

This will help me identify all timeout-related errors that occurred during our API testing session.
truth:
The following setup is required before the task begins:

1. Create directory: `/home/user/api_logs/`

2. Create the input log file at `/home/user/api_logs/payment_api.log` with the following exact contents:

```
[2024-01-15 10:23:45] [INFO] [REQ-A1B2C3] - Payment request initiated for $150.00
[2024-01-15 10:23:46] [ERROR] [REQ-A1B2C3] - Connection timeout to payment gateway
[2024-01-15 10:24:01] [INFO] [REQ-D4E5F6] - Payment request initiated for $75.50
[2024-01-15 10:24:02] [DEBUG] [REQ-D4E5F6] - Validating card number
[2024-01-15 10:24:03] [ERROR] [REQ-D4E5F6] - Invalid card number format
[2024-01-15 10:25:15] [INFO] [REQ-G7H8I9] - Payment request initiated for $200.00
[2024-01-15 10:25:17] [ERROR] [REQ-G7H8I9] - Database connection TIMEOUT exceeded
[2024-01-15 10:26:30] [WARN] [REQ-J1K2L3] - Retry attempt 1 for payment processing
[2024-01-15 10:26:45] [ERROR] [REQ-J1K2L3] - Read Timeout while waiting for response
[2024-01-15 10:27:00] [INFO] [REQ-M4N5O6] - Payment successful, transaction ID: TXN-98765
[2024-01-15 10:28:10] [ERROR] [REQ-P7Q8R9] - Authentication failed for merchant
[2024-01-15 10:29:00] [ERROR] [REQ-S1T2U3] - Socket timeout during SSL handshake
[2024-01-15 10:30:00] [INFO] [REQ-V4W5X6] - Batch processing completed
```

3. Expected output file at `/home/user/api_logs/timeout_errors.txt` should contain exactly these 4 lines:

```
[2024-01-15 10:23:46] [ERROR] [REQ-A1B2C3] - Connection timeout to payment gateway
[2024-01-15 10:25:17] [ERROR] [REQ-G7H8I9] - Database connection TIMEOUT exceeded
[2024-01-15 10:26:45] [ERROR] [REQ-J1K2L3] - Read Timeout while waiting for response
[2024-01-15 10:29:00] [ERROR] [REQ-S1T2U3] - Socket timeout during SSL handshake
```

Verification criteria:
- The file `/home/user/api_logs/timeout_errors.txt` must exist
- The file must contain exactly 4 lines
- All 4 lines must contain "[ERROR]" 
- All 4 lines must contain "timeout" (case-insensitive match)
- The lines must be in the order shown above (same order as source file)
- The lines must be exact copies from the original file (no modifications)
